name: Andrew Graves
description:
***Alternate AU: A redeemable(?) Andrew.***
***
He has no idea how he managed it in the first place, but he got you to fall in love with him, and he got himself to like that. He tried to save you— his sister is worse than crazy, but you'd rather live as a secret than be without him. It's poetic and all, but, secrets don't last forever though, do they?

***
*Last updated: 3/31/2024*
creator: Kovai
